semantic.role: Demonstration script for ArchSpine CLI workflow
responsibilities: Showcase the ArchSpine build, sync, check, and fix commands in sequence
Illustrate the typical workflow of initializing a project's spine (index and atlas)
Provide a visual walkthrough for evaluating ArchSpine's capabilities
outOfScope: Comprehensive reference documentation for ArchSpine CLI flags
Explanation of underlying architecture or design principles

English.purpose: This document is a terminal recording script (demo tape) that walks through the core ArchSpine workflow: building the project, cleaning a demo project's spine data, then running 'sync', 'check', and 'fix' commands. It serves as a quick, visual introduction to how ArchSpine manages project documentation and governance.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and technical evaluators who want to see ArchSpine in action before reading deeper documentation. It is also useful for presenters or tutorial creators who need a repeatable demo scenario.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine sync generates and updates the spine index and atlas from source code
ArchSpine check detects violations (missing docs, architectural drift)
ArchSpine fix interactively repairs detected issues
The demo shows a complete 'clean slate to fixed state' cycle in seconds

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该文档是一个终端录制脚本（演示带），逐步展示 ArchSpine 的核心工作流程：构建项目、清理演示项目的脊柱数据，然后依次运行 sync、check 和 fix 命令。它作为快速、直观的入门演示，帮助了解 ArchSpine 如何管理项目文档与治理。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向希望在深入阅读文档之前先亲眼看看 ArchSpine 实际操作的开发者与技术评估者。也适用于需要可重复演示场景的讲师或教程创作者。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine 的 sync 命令能从源代码生成并更新脊柱索引与地图集
check 命令可检测文档缺失、架构漂移等违规
fix 命令能交互式地修复检测到的问题
整个演示在几秒内完成从“空白状态”到“修复完成”的完整循环
